tracks.rawText: 2:10[Rec] Jun 5 00:06:33v5.5CoverDancehall with a heavy digital influence, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass plays a syncopated two-bar loop, The drum pattern features a sharp, high-frequency snare on the third beat of every bar and a dry, punchy kick drum, A repetitive, high-pitched staccato synth pluck provides a rhythmic counterpoint, Male vocals are delivered in a rhythmic, melodic patois style with moderate reverb, The tempo is 100 BPM in the key of G minorPublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 2:07rubv5.5CoverBoom bap hip hop, A melancholic piano loop plays a minor key progression with a slight vinyl crackle effect, The drum kit features a punchy, dry kick on beats 1 and 3, with a crisp, layered snare on 2 and 4, A steady 16th-note closed hi-hat pattern provides rhythmic drive, A deep, sub-heavy synth bass follows the piano's root notes, Male vocals are delivered in a rapid-fire, rhythmic Spanish rap style with a dry, upfront mix, The tempo is 92 BPM in the key of C minorPublishRemix
